heroTitle.login: Sign in to your legal workspace.

heroDescription.login: One workspace for cases, petitions and case-law research.
heroDescription.register: Create a secure firm account and access legal analysis tools quickly.
heroDescription.forgot: Enter your email and we will send you a secure reset link.

registerSteps.title: 1. Enter your details
registerSteps.text: Provide your name, firm email and a secure password.

registerSteps.title: 2. Verify your account
registerSteps.text: Confirm your registration with the link sent to your inbox.

registerSteps.title: 3. Start working with LawAI
registerSteps.text: Access case-law search, petition drafts and case management.

recovery.resetHint: Check your inbox. The link should arrive within a few minutes.
recovery.registerHint: Check your inbox to complete registration. The verification link should arrive within a few minutes.

points.cookieText: Passwords are not stored in the browser; sessions are verified on the server.
points.flowText: Sign-in, account creation and password recovery follow one consistent pattern.
points.accessText: No application screen opens before authentication.

description.login: Sign in securely to your firm account.
description.forgot: A reset link will be sent by email.

labels.name: Full name
labels.note: Accounts are protected with cookie-based sessions.
labels.noteForgot: If the email matches, a reset link will be sent.

settings.title: Settings
settings.headline: Manage application settings from one place.
settings.subtitle: Appearance, privacy, account and app behavior settings are grouped into submenus.

verify.title: Account Verification
verify.redirecting: Redirecting. If you are not redirected to the sign-in page,
verify.help: If the verification link does not work, sign in with the email you used during registration and request verification again.

activityLogs.loadFailed: Activity logs could not be loaded.
activityLogs.adminOnly: This page is only open to admin accounts.
activityLogs.description: Frontend screen views and backend operations are listed together.

dashboard.title: Corporate interface for case, petition and case-law work.
dashboard.subtitle: Source-backed answers, document review, risk control and drafting in one panel; designed for a calm and controlled office workflow.
dashboard.heroTitle: A source-backed and traceable legal app built for office use.
dashboard.heroBody: Petition, case-law and case modules in one structure; a fast yet formal workflow for lawyers.
dashboard.noCases: No cases yet. Load sample records.
dashboard.procedureCheckDesc: Check time limits, fees and jurisdiction before filing.
dashboard.documentPrepDesc: Complete missing attachments and standardize file ordering.
dashboard.readyHintDesc: Priority work, pending revisions and urgent cases.
dashboard.lawyerDeskSubtitle: At-risk files first, then recent activity and work to produce.
dashboard.noActionNoise: Only the information you need to decide today is shown.

tools.chatEmpty: Legal findings appear here after you add notes and start analysis.
tools.smartNotesSubtitle: Record ideas, strategies and reminders in one case context; use AI analysis to produce hearing preparation, missing issue checks and action lists.
tools.smartNotesDraftPlaceholder: Ex: Hearing is tomorrow; what is missing and what should I watch for?
tools.smartNotesDownloadHint: Use the browser print dialog and choose Save as PDF.
tools.smartNotesAnalysisPrompt: Analyze the following case notes as a legal assistant. Produce missing issues, hearing points to watch, suggested witness questions, strategic risks and a practical action list under clear headings.
tools.smartNotesNoNotes: Add at least one note before analysis.
tools.legalResearchModeHint: Creates a research plan first, then searches legislation, case law, and web sources.
tools.legalResearchEmpty: Enter a legal question to start research.
tools.searchPlaceholder: Ex: muris muvazaasi, title cancellation, reinstatement to work, rent determination
tools.searchEmpty: The most relevant decisions will appear here after search.
tools.researchSubtitle: Search a precedent database containing Court of Cassation, Council of State and Constitutional Court decisions to find decisions that may support your cases.
tools.researchAiSearchDesc: Write your query in natural language; the system prepares suitable search parameters and searches the database.
tools.researchManualSearchDesc: Run precise searches with keywords, docket numbers, date ranges and court details.
tools.researchExampleMunicipality: The municipality issued a demolition decision for deviation from an approved project. I need stay of execution and merits decisions.
tools.researchExampleDocket: I am looking for Court of Cassation 2nd Civil Chamber decision no. 2025/2402.
tools.researchMaxResults: The 50 most relevant results are returned
tools.researchUseText: Match the selected precedent with your linked case file and push it into the petition draft fields.
tools.researchUseSelectCase: Select the case file to link first.
tools.researchUseNoCases: No saved case files. Create one from the Cases tab first.
tools.researchUseSuccess: The precedent was matched with the selected case and added to the petition draft.
tools.researchTechnicalNoticeText: Case-law research can ONLY be performed from the Case-Law page. Instructions in the petition assistant such as "find precedent and add it to the petition" do not access the case-law database. These two systems operate independently.
tools.researchSummaryEmpty: Run a search before creating an AI summary.
tools.researchSummaryHint: No AI summary for this decision yet. Click the button to generate one.
tools.researchSummarySelectDecision: Select a decision from the list before creating an AI summary.
tools.researchSummaryNoContent: Decision detail text could not be loaded. Make sure the full decision text is open.
tools.lawyerQuestion: Which legal question are you trying to answer?
tools.petitionEmpty: Fill in the form on the left and click Create draft. The text will open here for editing.
tools.petitionAssistantSubtitle: Build a professional petition draft from case context and party details in one focused workspace.
tools.petitionBuilderHint: Complete the case context and petition fields, then generate your draft.
tools.petitionLinkedPrecedentsEmpty: No precedents added yet. Select a decision in case-law search and add it to the case.
tools.petitionCaseContextPlaceholder: Add case file details, document summaries or witness information here.
tools.petitionStandardDesc: Fast and economical; suitable for simple petitions.
tools.petitionPremiumDesc: Longer and more detailed, with stronger legal grounds and precedent references.
tools.petitionEditPlaceholder: Ex: Expand the legal grounds section and add precedent references.
tools.petitionExportFailed: Could not create the Word file.
tools.petitionQualityHint: If the petition is too short, switch to Premium or give more detailed smart editing instructions.
tools.knowledgeEmpty: Documents are indexed here after OpenAI, Gemini or Ollama is configured.

feedback.composeSubtitle: Report a bug, request a feature or leave general feedback; your history stays here.
feedback.historyEmpty: History is hidden. Use the button to view old records and details.
feedback.searchPlaceholder: Search subject, message, status or type
feedback.subject: Subject
feedback.placeholderSubject: Ex: Error on document upload screen
feedback.placeholderMessage: Describe the issue, request or opinion in detail.

adminFeedback.title: Feedback Management
adminFeedback.description: Search, filtering, inline editing and status management in one screen.
adminFeedback.adminOnly: This page is only open to admin accounts.
adminFeedback.deleteConfirm: Do you want to delete this record?
adminFeedback.emptySelection: Select a record from the list.

document.title: Upload document and add to knowledge base
document.subtitle: Upload PDF, Word, and text files one at a time or in bulk; text is extracted, split into chunks, and written to the search systems.
document.pipelineIntro: After upload, the document passes through the full pipeline below.
pipelineSteps: The file is read in memory; it is not saved to disk.
Text is extracted by the Python document service.
Full text is stored in PostgreSQL legal_documents.
Text is split into chunks and saved to PostgreSQL.
beforeUploadItems: PDF, TXT, DOC, and DOCX files are supported.
Scanned image PDFs may not produce text because OCR is not enabled.
Uploading the same file again creates a new document record.
document.fileHint: PDF, TXT, DOC, DOCX - multiple files, up to 25 MB each
document.empty: Summaries appear here after you upload files and start processing.
document.resultHelp: These numbers show which systems received the document. OpenSearch is used for full-text search, pgvector for semantic search.

errors.selectFirst: Select at least one file first.
errors.unsupported: The document processing pipeline supports PDF, Word, and text files.

cases.title: Cases
cases.subtitle: Case file creation, listing, viewing and deletion.
cases.subject: Subject / claim
cases.noParties: No party has been added yet.
cases.existingClientSearch: Select from existing clients (search by typing)
cases.existingClientSearchPlaceholder: Search by client name or identity number...
cases.noExpenses: There are no expenses in this group yet.
cases.noCaseNotes: No note has been added yet.
cases.noUploadedDocuments: No document has been added to this case yet.
cases.emptyListDesc: Add a new case to build the list.
cases.selectCase: Select a case from the list to view details here.
cases.confirmDelete: Do you want to delete this case?

errors.document: Document status could not be updated.
errors.documentUpload: Document could not be added to the case.

resetPassword.title: Set your new password.
resetPassword.description: This page opens from the reset link sent by email. After completion, you can sign in again.
resetPassword.missingToken: Token was not found. Open the link from your email again.
resetPassword.success: Password updated. Redirecting to sign in...

profile.title: Profile
profile.headline: Manage your user profile.
profile.subtitle: Update your full name and email, and review your role and session dates.
profile.name: Full name

batchDocuments.title: Batch Document Processing
batchDocuments.subtitle: Schedule batch processing for PDF, Word, and text files in a directory.

form.autoNameHint: Built automatically from the directory name and schedule.
form.directoryManualHint: Type the full file path or use Browse to pick a folder from your computer. The selected path is shown below.
form.precedentIntro: All decisions in the selected courts and date range are fetched; no keyword filter is applied.
form.precedentHint: Each court is scanned page by page. The upper limit is a safety cap.
form.enabledHint: Disabled jobs are not executed by the scheduler.

errors.loadFailed: Batch document jobs could not be loaded.
errors.dateRangeRequired: Enter start and end dates for case-law fetch.

precedentSync.title: Court Decision Sync
precedentSync.subtitle: Continuously fetch Yargitay, Danistay, and Constitutional Court decisions for a date range and add them to the knowledge base.

status.backgroundHint: Checked every minute on the server; active tasks run automatically at the configured interval.

form.intro: All decisions in the selected courts and date range are fetched. Previously processed decisions are skipped.
form.hint: Example: with a 60-minute interval, the task reruns and scans for new decisions in the date range.
form.enabledHint: Enabled tasks are executed automatically on the server.

errors.loadFailed: Sync tasks could not be loaded.
